programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Aaron Rodgers fired a 48-yard touchdown to Randall Cobb in the final minute, and the Packers beat the Chicago Bears 33-28 to capture the NFC North championship.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Chiefs intercepted Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott at crucial points in the game, helping the AFC West-leading Chiefs roll to a 19-9 victory over the Cowboys inside noticeably raucous Arrowhead Stadium.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes overcame two interceptions to deliver a few big plays with his feet and the Chiefs remained the league's only undefeated team, beating the San Francisco 49ers 28-18 Sunday in a Super Bowl rematch.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Baker Mayfield and the Buccaneers battle with Sam Darnold and the Seahawks in a back-and-forth shootout that features an elite wide receiver matchup between Emeka Egbuka and Jaxon Smith-Njigba in a game that comes down to the wire.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Phillip Rivers and Colts overcome a 14-point first half deficit in an overtime victory over Aaron Rodgers and Packers.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XXV: Buffalo Bills vs. New York Giants
programme.desc: From Jan. 27, 1991 in Tampa.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classic Games
programme.sub-title: Super Bowl XLII: Giants vs. Patriots
programme.desc: Relive the Super Bowl XLII matchup between the New York Giants and the New England Patriots by watching one of the greatest upsets in NFL history.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: LII: Philadelphia Eagles vs. New England Patriots
programme.desc: Nick Foles and the underdog Eagles battle with the defending Super Bowl champion Patriots in a memorable matchup as the Eagles triumph and win their first championship in franchise history. From Feb. 4, 2018.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: LII: Philadelphia Eagles vs. New England Patriots
programme.desc: Nick Foles and the underdog Eagles battle with the defending Super Bowl champion Patriots in a memorable matchup as the Eagles triumph and win their first championship in franchise history. From Feb. 4, 2018.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XLIX: New England Patriots vs. Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: Tom Brady leads the New England Patriots' comeback and a game-ending interception by Malcolm Butler at the 1-yard line seals the 28-24 victory.

programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: XLIX: New England Patriots vs. Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: Tom Brady leads the New England Patriots' comeback and a game-ending interception by Malcolm Butler at the 1-yard line seals the 28-24 victory.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants on teams representing the United States and Europe begin their quest to realize a dream and play on golf's grandest stage. Featuring PGA Tour winner Tommy Gainey.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The players get down to business and try to avoid being the first contestant eliminated. The show's signature glass panes challenge is played with a new twist, and the contestants learn about Carnoustie's famous Miller Bunker.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A rush of national pride consumes the players as they tee it up in their first team, match-play competition to determine who's up for elimination, where it's distance control that determines an unlucky player's fate.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: It's all about accuracy as the contestants test their approach shots and drive for more than just show to stay alive.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants experience déjà vu as they try to earn immunity from elimination, while an unfortunate few battle gusty winds and attempt to get a handle on distance control.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Contestants take a surprise field trip to St. Andrews - the bastion of golf - and have to deal with the pressure as an unexpected gallery gathers to watch them perform.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The golf course plays no favorites as both teams find out that sometimes it's not so easy to make par.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: An elimination challenge with a variety of shot results along with an emotional send-off.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The Europeans are faced with a no-win situation and scrap team unity for individual survival. Players get to choose the shot that just may end up proving their demise.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: Nearly impossible bunker shots have the players trying to avoid making spectacles of themselves, while it's a one-on-one contest that determines who stays and who goes.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: A contest designed for national bragging rights keeps the final USA and European contestants focused on team play.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: The remaining two Americans face nine holes of match play - as do their European counterparts - to determine who will play for the championship.

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: National pride and lifelong dreams are at stake as the finalists representing the United States and Europe face off in the championship match.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Brianna Asman as they learn how to increase range of motion, add distance and play pain-free golf through a 90-day program of swing instruction.

programme.title: Pain Free Golf
programme.desc: Follow Randall Hunt and Matt Avril learn how to increase mobility and turn his slice into a powerful draw.
